name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement (DPA) covering processor and subprocessor relationships and the processing of personal data on behalf of a customer.

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.help: The date this DPA takes effect (typically the same as the underlying service agreement).

fields.label: Underlying Agreement
fields.help: Name or reference of the main service agreement this DPA supplements (e.g. 'Cloud Service Agreement dated 2025-01-01').

fields.label: Service Description
fields.help: Brief description of the Service provided under the Agreement.

fields.label: Nature and Purpose of Processing
fields.help: Describe the nature of the processing activities and the purpose for which Customer Personal Data is processed (e.g. hosting, analytics, support).

fields.label: Categories of Personal Data
fields.help: List the types of personal data processed (e.g. names, email addresses, usage logs, payment information).

fields.label: Categories of Data Subjects
fields.help: Identify the categories of individuals whose personal data is processed (e.g. Customer's employees, end users, customers).

fields.label: Duration of Processing
fields.help: How long Provider will process the personal data (e.g. 'For the term of the Agreement plus 30 days for deletion').

fields.label: Frequency of Transfer
fields.help: How often personal data is transferred to Provider (e.g. 'Continuous', 'On-demand', 'Daily batch').

fields.label: Special Category Data
fields.help: Does the processing involve Special Category Data as defined under Article 9 of the GDPR (e.g. health, racial/ethnic origin, biometrics)?

fields.label: Special Category Data Restrictions or Safeguards
fields.help: If Special Category Data is processed, describe any restrictions or additional safeguards that apply.

fields.label: Security Policy
fields.help: URL or name of Provider's information security policy or standards document (e.g. 'https://example.com/security' or 'ISO 27001 policy dated 2025-01-01').

fields.label: Provider Security Contact
fields.help: Email address or name/title of the Provider contact for security due diligence and audit requests.

fields.label: Governing Member State
fields.help: The EU/EEA member state whose law governs the EEA Standard Contractual Clauses (Clause 17), if applicable (e.g. 'Ireland', 'Germany'). Leave blank if EEA SCCs do not apply.
